name: @axicharts/charts-full
description: Batteries-included AxiCharts meta-package — full chart surface plus spec, runtime, and theme.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/spec.ts src/runtime.ts src/theme.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external echarts --external uplot --external @axicharts/charts --external @axicharts/charts-spec --external @axicharts/charts-runtime --external @axicharts/charts-theme --external @axicharts/charts-core --external @axicharts/charts-canvas --external @axicharts/charts-echarts --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/spec.ts src/runtime.ts src/theme.ts --format esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external echarts --external uplot --external @axicharts/charts --external @axicharts/charts-spec --external @axicharts/charts-runtime --external @axicharts/charts-theme --external @axicharts/charts-core --external @axicharts/charts-canvas --external @axicharts/charts-echarts --watch
